title: Sculkman's Decor
body:
# Sculkman's Decor
Sculk-based means of decorating your builds and protecting them.

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Lpk7OoEb/images/bc28cc9b1bd520978c93afa358e53816eba73c24_350.webp)

## Features
- Home defense
- Attack means
- XP Storing

### Blocks
* Sculk Bone Block
  * Available in the stonecutter:
    * Slabs, Stairs, & Walls
    * Bricks
    * Chiseled variant
* [WIP] Sculkshroom
* Sonic Boom Generator
    - A block that will generate powerful beams of sound directed at players that aren't the owner of the blocks and contained within an exception list accessible by right-clicking the block.
* XP Bank wip
   - Is currently non functional, the xp capacitor word fine though
    - Allows you to store up to 50 levels of xp.
    - Right click to withdraw a level.
    - Shift right click to deposit a level.
    - *Currently not compatible with any mods that contains xp as fluid*

### Items
* Echo Glaive
    - Right click to create a Sonic Boom akin to a Warden.
    - Shift right click to summon a weakened Warden in the near vicinity at the cost of 10 levels and/or hp.
      - The Warden will only have 100 hp.
      - The Warden will deal reduced damage.
      - Shift right click on these warden to make them despawn.
* XP Capacitor
    - Allows you to store up to 10 levels of xp.
    - Right click to withdraw a level.
    - Shift right click to deposit a level.
* Sculk Scimitar
    - Stats of a netherite sword
    - Repaired with echo shards
    - Has a different texture
* Warden's War Axe
    - Stats of a netherite axe
    - Repaired with echo shards
    - Has a different texture
* Sculk Bone
